intent: Develop a secure, scalable e-commerce platform that facilitates product browsing, cart management, and integrated payment processing for customers.

entities.name: User
entities.description: Represents a customer or administrator with authentication credentials and profile details.

entities.name: Product
entities.description: Stores details about items available for sale including price, stock levels, and descriptions.

entities.name: Cart
entities.description: Manages temporary association of products selected by a user prior to checkout.

entities.name: Order
entities.description: Records completed transactions including status, customer information, and payment references.

entities.name: PaymentGateway
entities.description: An external interface responsible for processing secure financial transactions.

entities.name: AdminDashboard
entities.description: An interface for staff to manage product inventory and track order fulfillment.

architecture.description: The system architecture follows a microservices-ready approach where users authenticate to browse products and manage a cart. Upon checkout, the system initiates an Order entity, coordinates with an external PaymentGateway to process funds, and updates inventory levels via the AdminDashboard. All transactional data is secured and stored in a centralized database, ensuring data integrity and scalability.

endpoints.summary: Create a new order from cart

components.content: List of items currently in cart
Management list of products with update capability

rules.description: Prevent orders for items with insufficient stock levels.
rules.logic: If Order.quantity > Product.stock_level, then reject transaction and return validation error.
The price of the item at the time of checkout must match the current Product.price; if mismatch detected, trigger recalculation.

rules.description: Atomic transition of order status upon successful payment.
rules.logic: Upon PaymentGateway.success, transition Order.status from 'PENDING' to 'PAID' and decrement Product.stock_level.

rules.description: Validate user authorization for administrative inventory actions.
rules.logic: If User.role != 'ADMIN', then block write/update access to AdminDashboard functions.
If Cart is abandoned for more than 30 days, clear items and release associated inventory reservations.

rules.description: Verify payment reference uniqueness to prevent duplicate charges.
rules.logic: Ensure Order.payment_id is unique across all database records before confirming order completion.
